rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it empirically investigates the core mechanism of "transferring manipulation skills" (sim-to-real transfer) in robot manipulation, which is the central topic of the user's referenced work, even though it focuses specifically on the action space variable rather than the "translation" aspect.
